mustPass: Has home route '/' and contact route.
Reflects telecom buying journey with solutions and pricing as core pages.
Supports trust signals around security, support and reliability without making unverifiable claims.
Uses Swedish lowercase paths with leading slash and no trailing slash.
Provides sectionsPerRoute for every default route.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: generic local-service structure without telecom-specific solution and pricing pages
invented certifications, uptime figures, customer counts or coverage claims
overloading the site with technical jargon before explaining customer benefit
mixing support promises and commercial CTAs in a confusing way
